top_signals.title: Qatar Rushes to Bring Back Empty LNG Ships as It Lifts Exports
top_signals.summary: Qatar is seeking to bring more empty liquefied natural gas tankers back home, as the nation aims to return about a fifth of global supply.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Pound Trades Near 2026 Low as UK Political Uncertainty Builds
top_signals.summary: The pound traded near this year’s low on expectations Keir Starmer will set out a timetable for his departure as UK prime minister in coming days.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Why Giorgia Meloni turned on Donald Trump
top_signals.summary: Italian premier’s fallout with US president comes as she gears up for re-election battle

top_signals.title: Wyndham Clark hangs on in final round for wire-to-wire win at U.S. Open
top_signals.summary: Clark became only the ninth true wire-to-wire U.S. Open winner as he kept the outright lead following all four rounds to pick up the title for a second time.
